title: MorisMos Giant Golden Retriever Dog Teddy for Girls, Beige Kawaii Puppy Stuffed Animal Plush Toy Soft Cuddly Big, Cute Birthday Presents for Kids Girlfriend Party Decorations (80cm)
features: Cute Dog Cuddles: Large puppy soft toy 80 cm tall is great for hugging and snuggling; a snuggly playtime companion; ideal for travelling and sleeping; and it can easily be taken anywhere.

Wonderful Soft and Cuddly: Premium quality for the ultimate cuddle and squeeze experience; skin-friendly and strongly stitched; ultra soft to touch; perfect for cuddling up all night as a body pillow to relieve fatigue and heal the mood; A stuffed doggy that brings joy with every cuddle!
Adorable and Distinctive: This lifelike dog teddy bear is sure to bring a smile to any face with its cute design, expressive face, a fluffy body, a good companion for playing and sleeping together.

Present of Love: A surprising birthday Presents for kids, girlfriend, wife, boyfriend, husband, girls, boys, or family. And great for Valentines, Children's Day, Mothers'Day, Christmas, and Party Decoration. Sure to become a beloved and cherished toy for anyone who receives it.

Warm Tips: MorisMos uses a vacuum sealed package, please do not worry. Once opened, the plushy toy will take its shape, it takes about 30 minutes. And patting will make the pulsh restore the shape quickly. If you have any problems, please contact us, we need to help you resolve it. We are always here for you.
description: Product Description Looking for a soft and cuddly companion for your loved ones? Meet the MorisMos Gaint Dogteddy ! This adorable gaint dog soft toy is always ready for a soft cuddle and snuggle! MorisMos plush toy is irresistibly fluffy and cuddly, and more than just cute! It's an excellent snuggle buddy that promises endless moments of comfort and companionship. A great way to spoil your kids, make them smile and meet new friends. MorisMos realistic dog soft toy is sure to put a smile on any face with its cute design, cuddly softness and expressive eyes. He will always be smiling at you, soothing your mood and making you forget the worries of the day. Perfect for those looking for a lifelike plushy soft toy to cuddle with. What's more, this kawaii dog stuffed animal can also be a favourite play and bedtime companion as they grow up, with its soft comfort to ease fatigue, cuddle and sleep with all night long An exciting gift to surprise for your Your Loved Ones and express your love and care.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Promotes creativity, imagination and hand-eye coordination in children
